# Anju Batta

> Senior Full Stack Web Developer, Laravel Developer, AI Agent Developer, and Mobile App Developer in India with 15+ years of experience. Available for client projects, remote work, and fixed-price builds.

Anju Batta helps businesses hire one senior developer for Laravel web apps, AI agents, mobile apps, business websites, APIs, Shopify, WordPress, and n8n automation. Best suited for founders, agencies, SaaS teams, and businesses that need reliable development delivery from India.

## Core Services

- [Hire Laravel Developer in India](https://anjubatta.netlify.app/services/laravel-development/): Custom Laravel web apps, SaaS platforms, REST APIs, admin dashboards, eCommerce systems, migrations, and ongoing PHP/Laravel support.
- [Hire AI Agent Developer in India](https://anjubatta.netlify.app/services/ai-agent-development/): OpenAI and Claude agents, RAG systems, tool-calling workflows, internal copilots, AI chatbots, and business automation.
- [Hire Mobile App Developer in India](https://anjubatta.netlify.app/services/mobile-app-development/): iOS, Android, and cross-platform business apps with APIs, admin panels, payments, notifications, and launch support.
- [Hire Web Developer in India](https://anjubatta.netlify.app/services/nextjs-development/): SEO-ready websites, Next.js/React web apps, landing pages, business websites, and API integrations.
- [Business Automation - n8n & Zapier](https://anjubatta.netlify.app/services/workflow-automation/): CRM sync, lead routing, reporting, eCommerce workflows, self-hosted n8n, and operations automation.
- [Shopify & WordPress Development](https://anjubatta.netlify.app/): Custom Shopify themes, WooCommerce/WordPress builds, CMS integrations, and maintenance.

## Technology Stack

- AI & GenAI: Claude, ChatGPT, Claude Code, Bolt, Lovable, V0, OpenAI API
- Automation: n8n (self-hosted), Zapier, Make, Webhooks
- Backend: Laravel, PHP, Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, GraphQL
- Frontend: React, VueJS, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, HTML, CSS
- CMS: WordPress, Shopify, Ghost, Wix, BigCommerce, Kajabi, Framer
- Databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Airtable
- BI Tools: Power BI, Google Analytics, Tableau
- Mobile: iOS, Android, Ionic, Flutter, React Native, Angular

## Portfolio

- [All Projects (20+)](https://anjubatta.netlify.app/project_list.html): Web development, eCommerce, real estate, SaaS, and automation projects for clients in India, UK, USA, and Australia.

## Experience

- 12+ years of professional development experience
- 500+ websites and applications delivered
- Team Leader at Paradise Tech Soft Solution Pvt. Ltd. (2017–2021)
- Freelance Developer for Property Webmaster UK (2021–2024)
- Junior/Mid PHP Developer at Cweb Consultants & 3 Beavers (2014–2017)
